system.effect: The psyker releases a powerful telekinetic shockwave in all directions. All creatures within Psy Rating x 3 metres must pass a Strength test or be knocked Prone and pushed 1d5 metres away from the psyker.

description.value: The psyker releases a sudden burst of telekinetic force in all directions, hurling nearby creatures and objects away. All creatures within Psy Rating x 3 metres must pass a Strength test or be knocked Prone and pushed 1d5 metres directly away from the psyker. Creatures that strike solid objects during this forced movement may take additional Impact damage.
